name: io.github.michielinksee/linksee-memory
description: Local-first cross-agent memory with drift detection. 7 MCP tools: remember/recall/read_smart + 4 drift tools (drift_status/check_decision/declare_anchor/resolve_drift). 6-layer WHY structure, AST diff cache (86% token savings), works across Claude/Cursor/GPT/Codex/Gemini.
